message:
feat: direct socket connect for numeric hosts, io_uring SQ-full retry, and pin-project RateLimitFuture

- http_client: skip DNS resolution when host is a numeric IP address
  (IPv4 or IPv6) by connecting via TcpStream::connect_socket_addr
- tcp/stream: add connect_socket_addr() to connect directly to a
  SocketAddr without DNS lookup (with wasm32 stub)
- io_uring reactor: retry submit_poll_add and submit_poll_remove when
  the submission queue is full by flushing first, instead of returning
  WouldBlock; add POLLRDHUP to readable/hup interest masks so
  half-closed connections are detected
- rate_limit: use pin_project to soundly project through Pin<&mut Self>
  in RateLimitFuture::poll instead of get_mut + Pin::new

Includes unit tests for all changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
